feature: instant estimate recalc on «не считать вторые сутки» toggle
technical_review: self (trivial 4-line frontend reactivity fix, 270/270 web tests green)
notes: Bug: BookingForm debounced /quote effect dep array omitted skipPartialDay → toggling the checkbox never re-fetched the server estimate (only the local label updated via rentalDuration useMemo). Fix: (1) add skipPartialDay to the effect deps; (2) prevSkipPartialRef tracks the flag — when it changed (discrete checkbox click) debounceMs=0 (instant recalc), otherwise 500ms (typing stays debounced, no /quote spam). Edit/mount init: prevSkipPartialRef seeded from initial skipPartialDay → no spurious instant on load. Early-return-before-ref-update path only yields at-worst one harmlessly-fast quote when completing an incomplete form post-toggle (no wrong data). Web-only, no API/schema change.
